llm_explanation: This deployment covers 500 premises in an Urban area with PON (GPON) architecture, 2 km from the Central Office. Total cost is driven by fiber and civil works. ROI and payback are based on assumed ARPU.
deployment_strategy: Phase feeder fiber first, then install splitters and distribution. Commission OLT and ONTs in stages.
optimization_suggestions: Consider higher split ratio (e.g. 1:64) to reduce OLT ports.
Phase deployment to prioritize high-ARPU areas.
Use existing duct infrastructure where available to reduce civil cost.
